task_completion.description: Open and read the project brief on the desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/mep_boiler_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Add a mechanical boiler (IfcBoiler) to the model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai (Blender) Outliner panel or 3D viewport shows a newly added 'IfcBoiler' element.

task_completion.description: Add at least two connection ports (IfcDistributionPort).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai Outliner or MEP port management UI shows at least two 'IfcDistributionPort' elements.

task_completion.description: Associate the connection ports with the boiler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Outliner shows the ports nested under the 'IfcBoiler', or the MEP panel shows the ports assigned to the boiler object.

task_completion.description: Export the project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai export dialog showing the path '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_mep_boiler.ifc', or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Bonsai (Blender) GUI to perform the modeling tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with Blender/Bonsai menus, Outliner, and 3D viewport, rather than just running a python script to generate the IFC.

integrity.description: Verify the IFC file was exported from Bonsai, not just created as an empty file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog in Bonsai is visible, or terminal commands show actual file size/content, not just a 'touch' command creating a dummy file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not download or copy a pre-made IFC file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The step-by-step creation of the boiler and ports is visible in the screenshots over time.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project brief is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/mep_boiler_spec.txt'. The task requires adding at least 1 'IfcBoiler' and at least 2 'IfcDistributionPort's to the model. The final output must be exported to '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_mep_boiler.ifc'. While partial points can be awarded for creating unlinked ports, full completion requires the ports to be properly associated/nested with the boiler.
